name: Stir Fried Mixed Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Medium Cabbage or White Chinese Cabbage
Few leaves of Mustard Greens or Spinach Leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak dried mushrooms in hot water for 30 minutes. Remove and discard stems, slice tops thinly.
2. Simmer the sliced mushroom tops in a small saucepan with 1/2 cup water, dark soy sauce, sesame oil, and sugar until the liquid is almost absorbed.
3. Slice celery diagonally into bite-size pieces. Cut white cabbage, mustard greens/spinach leaves, and lettuce into bite-size squares. Chop spring onions into short lengths.
4. Fry garlic and ginger in 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-low heat for a few seconds only.
5. Add the vegetable stems to the pan and stir-fry over high heat for 2 minutes.
6. Add the leafy vegetables and stir-fry for an additional 30 seconds.
7. Add the sauce mixture (dark soy sauce, sugar, and remaining water) and the prepared mushrooms. Mix well.
8. Add more water if needed to reach desired consistency. Bring to a boil, then thicken with cornstarch blended with a little cold water. Stir until it boils and thickens.
9. Serve immediately over rice.
